'''âj-h-b''' ('''kajahab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monish|monish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monish|monish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kajahab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijahab|thijahab]] || [[word:jijahab|jijahab]] || [[word:shijahab|shijahab]] || [[word:kijahab|kijahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujahab|thuthujahab]] || [[word:jujujahab|jujujahab]] || [[word:shushujahab|shushujahab]] || [[word:kukujahab|kukujahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujahab|thujahab]] || [[word:jujahab|jujahab]] || [[word:shujahab|shujahab]] || [[word:kujahab|kujahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujahab|thujahab]] || [[word:jujahab|jujahab]] || [[word:shujahab|shujahab]] || [[word:kujahab|kujahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejahab|thejahab]] || [[word:jejahab|jejahab]] || [[word:shejahab|shejahab]] || [[word:kejahab|kejahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojahab|thothojahab]] || [[word:jojojahab|jojojahab]] || [[word:shoshojahab|shoshojahab]] || [[word:kokojahab|kokojahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojahab|thojahab]] || [[word:jojahab|jojahab]] || [[word:shojahab|shojahab]] || [[word:kojahab|kojahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojahab|thojahab]] || [[word:jojahab|jojahab]] || [[word:shojahab|shojahab]] || [[word:kojahab|kojahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjahab|thĂŠjahab]] || [[word:jĂŠjahab|jĂŠjahab]] || [[word:shĂŠjahab|shĂŠjahab]] || [[word:kĂŠjahab|kĂŠjahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajahab|thathajahab]] || [[word:jajajahab|jajajahab]] || [[word:shashajahab|shashajahab]] || [[word:kakajahab|kakajahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajahab|thajahab]] || [[word:jajahab|jajahab]] || [[word:shajahab|shajahab]] || [[word:kajahab|kajahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajahab|thajahab]] || [[word:jajahab|jajahab]] || [[word:shajahab|shajahab]] || [[word:kajahab|kajahab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajahab|shajahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajahab|goshajahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajahab|gokishajahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajahabnĂŒ|shajahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajahabnknĂŒ|goshajahabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahabnĂŒ|gokishajahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajahabshĂ«|shajahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajahabnkshĂ«|goshajahabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajahabshĂ«|gokishajahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahabro|shajahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahabnkro|goshajahabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahabro|gokishajahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahabmu|shajahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahabnkmu|goshajahabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahabmu|gokishajahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajahabsher|shajahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajahabnksher|goshajahabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajahabsher|gokishajahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajahabng|shajahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajahabnkng|goshajahabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajahabng|gokishajahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajahabya|shajahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajahabnkya|goshajahabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajahabya|gokishajahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajahabyam|shajahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajahabnkyam|goshajahabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajahabyam|gokishajahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahabnĂŒshĂ«|shajahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajahabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahabnĂŒro|shajahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahabnknĂŒro|goshajahabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahabnĂŒro|gokishajahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahabnĂŒmu|shajahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahabnknĂŒmu|goshajahabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahabnĂŒmu|gokishajahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahabshĂ«nĂŒ|shajahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahabshĂ«ro|shajahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahabnkshĂ«ro|goshajahabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahabshĂ«ro|gokishajahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahabshĂ«mu|shajahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahabnkshĂ«mu|goshajahabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahabshĂ«mu|gokishajahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahabronĂŒ|shajahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahabnkronĂŒ|goshajahabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahabronĂŒ|gokishajahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahabroshĂ«|shajahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahabnkroshĂ«|goshajahabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahabroshĂ«|gokishajahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahabromu|shajahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahabnkromu|goshajahabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahabromu|gokishajahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahabmunĂŒ|shajahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahabnkmunĂŒ|goshajahabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahabmunĂŒ|gokishajahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahabmushĂ«|shajahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahabnkmushĂ«|goshajahabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahabmushĂ«|gokishajahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahabmuro|shajahabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahabnkmuro|goshajahabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahabmuro|gokishajahabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
